examples: She walked off the plane in a miniskirt and tight top.
They got shorter and shorter until the miniskirt was in fashion.
How do you think it goes with a miniskirt?
"You don't see a lot of companion characters wearing dresses -- at least not of the non-miniskirt variety, " Robertson said.
For every bouncy miniskirt there was a ladylike pencil, and broad-shouldered military coats were offset by gently molded oversized ones.
